column1: P1: ACTION/PROPS="Nodding deeply while listening to someone" | TEXT="左様ですね" P2: ACTION/PROPS="Looking sympathetic with a gentle gaze" | TEXT="お察しいたします" P3: ACTION/PROPS="Placing a hand over her heart in empathy" | TEXT="私も胸が痛みますわ" P4: ACTION/PROPS="Sharing a warm drink in a quiet room" | TEXT="お気持ち分かりますわ" P5: ACTION/PROPS="Giving a small, understanding nod" | TEXT="無理もございません" P6: ACTION/PROPS="Looking at the same view together silently" | TEXT="同じ思いでございます" P7: ACTION/PROPS="Wiping away a tear together" | TEXT="独りではございませんわ" P8: ACTION/PROPS="Offering a supportive smile during a talk" | TEXT="あなたの味方です" P9: ACTION/PROPS="Holding someone's hand through a sleeve" | TEXT="共に行きましょう"
